tariff_system: Combined Australian Customs Tariff Nomenclature and Statistical Classification (CACTNS)

summary.data_availability: Requires direct navigation or API access
summary.notes: Australian tariff data is highly structured and available but requires accessing multiple sources

sources.name: Australian Border Force (ABF) Tariff Classification
sources.description: Official source for Australian tariff classifications

structure.schedule_3: List of tariff classifications and applicable rates of duty (21 sections, 97 chapters)

challenges: No direct CSV export link found
Data spread across multiple schedule documents
Requires navigating Schedule 3 for detailed rates

sources.name: DFAT FTA Portal
sources.description: Free Trade Agreement tariff data portal
sources.status: Portal appears to be loading/dynamic content
challenges: Unable to access data through static HTML retrieval
Would require browser automation to interact with

sources.name: Integrated Cargo System (ICS)
challenges: System access restricted to registered traders

recommended_next_steps: Use Selenium or Puppeteer to automate DFAT Portal navigation
Download Schedule 3 PDF directly from ABF website
Parse PDF to extract tariff codes and rates
Contact ABF directly for bulk data export
Check AusTrade for trade preference data
Access ASEAN Trade Repository for Australia's AHTN equivalent

api_endpoints.notes: Australian systems appear to rely on web portal access rather than API
